title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXVIII. Riddles.
content:
Elizabeth, Elspeth, Betsy and Bess,
        They all went together to seek a bird's nest.
        They found a bird's nest with five eggs in,
        They all took one, and left four in.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXVIII. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
